{
 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# HUL Working Capital \u2014 AI/ML Forecast Model\n",
    "\n",
    "**Phase 1:** Libraries \u00b7 **Phase 2:** Historical dataset \u00b7 **Phase 3:** Linear Regression forecast \u00b7 **Phase 4:** Export to `AI_Predictions.xlsx` for Power BI.\n",
    "\n",
    "Model: `scikit-learn` `LinearRegression`, one model per metric (Revenue, DIO, DSO, DPO), trained on FY2021\u2013FY2025 actuals."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Phase 1: Install & import libraries"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 1,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "output_type": "stream",
     "name": "stdout",
     "text": [
      "Requirement already satisfied: pandas, numpy, scikit-learn, matplotlib, openpyxl\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "!pip install pandas numpy scikit-learn matplotlib openpyxl --quiet"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "output_type": "stream",
     "name": "stdout",
     "text": [
      "Libraries loaded: pandas 3.0.2 | numpy 2.4.4\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "import pandas as pd\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "from sklearn.linear_model import LinearRegression\n",
    "from sklearn.metrics import r2_score\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "from openpyxl import Workbook\n",
    "from openpyxl.styles import Font, PatternFill, Alignment, Border, Side\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"Libraries loaded: pandas\", pd.__version__, \"| numpy\", np.__version__)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Phase 2: Historical dataset (FY2021\u2013FY2025)\n",
    "\n",
    "Built from HUL's Raw Data (Revenue, COGS, Inventory, Receivables, Payables). DIO/DSO/DPO/CCC are derived using the standard formulas."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "output_type": "execute_result",
     "execution_count": 3,
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "   Year  Revenue    DIO    DSO     DPO    CCC\n",
       "0  2021    47028  46.91  14.67  125.03 -63.45\n",
       "1  2022    52446  45.76  15.31  119.31 -58.23\n",
       "2  2023    60580  43.00  14.88  113.16 -55.28\n",
       "3  2024    61896  46.53  15.86  123.88 -61.48\n",
       "4  2025    63121  47.27  16.31  135.41 -71.83"
      ],
      "text/html": [
       "<table border=\"1\" class=\"dataframe\">\n",
       "  <thead>\n",
       "    <tr style=\"text-align: right;\">\n",
       "      <th>Year</th>\n",
       "      <th>Revenue</th>\n",
       "      <th>DIO</th>\n",
       "      <th>DSO</th>\n",
       "      <th>DPO</th>\n",
       "      <th>CCC</th>\n",
       "    </tr>\n",
       "  </thead>\n",
       "  <tbody>\n",
       "    <tr>\n",
       "      <td>2021</td>\n",
       "      <td>47028</td>\n",
       "      <td>46.91</td>\n",
       "      <td>14.67</td>\n",
       "      <td>125.03</td>\n",
       "      <td>-63.45</td>\n",
       "    </tr>\n",
       "    <tr>\n",
       "      <td>2022</td>\n",
       "      <td>52446</td>\n",
       "      <td>45.76</td>\n",
       "      <td>15.31</td>\n",
       "      <td>119.31</td>\n",
       "      <td>-58.23</td>\n",
       "    </tr>\n",
       "    <tr>\n",
       "      <td>2023</td>\n",
       "      <td>60580</td>\n",
       "      <td>43.00</td>\n",
       "      <td>14.88</td>\n",
       "      <td>113.16</td>\n",
       "      <td>-55.28</td>\n",
       "    </tr>\n",
       "    <tr>\n",
       "      <td>2024</td>\n",
       "      <td>61896</td>\n",
       "      <td>46.53</td>\n",
       "      <td>15.86</td>\n",
       "      <td>123.88</td>\n",
       "      <td>-61.48</td>\n",
       "    </tr>\n",
       "    <tr>\n",
       "      <td>2025</td>\n",
       "      <td>63121</td>\n",
       "      <td>47.27</td>\n",
       "      <td>16.31</td>\n",
       "      <td>135.41</td>\n",
       "      <td>-71.83</td>\n",
       "    </tr>\n",
       "  </tbody>\n",
       "</table>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {}
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "raw = pd.DataFrame({\n",
    "    \"Year\": [2021, 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025],\n",
    "    \"Revenue\": [47028, 52446, 60580, 61896, 63121],\n",
    "    \"COGS\":    [22800, 26800, 30900, 29900, 30500],\n",
    "    \"Inventory\":   [2930, 3360, 3640, 3812, 3950],\n",
    "    \"Receivables\": [1890, 2200, 2470, 2690, 2820],\n",
    "    \"Payables\":    [7810, 8760, 9580, 10148, 11315],\n",
    "})\n",
    "\n",
    "raw[\"DIO\"] = raw[\"Inventory\"] / raw[\"COGS\"] * 365\n",
    "raw[\"DSO\"] = raw[\"Receivables\"] / raw[\"Revenue\"] * 365\n",
    "raw[\"DPO\"] = raw[\"Payables\"] / raw[\"COGS\"] * 365\n",
    "raw[\"CCC\"] = raw[\"DIO\"] + raw[\"DSO\"] - raw[\"DPO\"]\n",
    "\n",
    "history = raw[[\"Year\", \"Revenue\", \"DIO\", \"DSO\", \"DPO\", \"CCC\"]].round(2)\n",
    "history"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Phase 3: Build a simple forecast model\n",
    "\n",
    "A separate `LinearRegression` is fit per metric, using **Year** as the single feature. This is intentionally simple \u2014 a transparent linear trend, not a black box \u2014 so a CFO can sanity-check the slope per year directly. CCC is **not** modeled directly; it's derived afterwards from the predicted DIO + DSO \u2212 DPO, consistent with the rest of the workbook."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "output_type": "stream",
     "name": "stdout",
     "text": [
      "Model fit (R^2 on historical data, linear trend vs Year):\n",
      "  Revenue   R^2 = 0.892   slope/yr = 4163.600\n",
      "  DIO       R^2 = 0.019   slope/yr = 0.149\n",
      "  DSO       R^2 = 0.793   slope/yr = 0.383\n",
      "  DPO       R^2 = 0.239   slope/yr = 2.533\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "X_hist = history[[\"Year\"]].values\n",
    "future_years = np.array([2026, 2027, 2028]).reshape(-1, 1)\n",
    "\n",
    "targets = [\"Revenue\", \"DIO\", \"DSO\", \"DPO\"]\n",
    "models, predictions, scores = {}, {}, {}\n",
    "\n",
    "for target in targets:\n",
    "    y_hist = history[target].values\n",
    "    model = LinearRegression()\n",
    "    model.fit(X_hist, y_hist)\n",
    "    pred = model.predict(future_years)\n",
    "    r2 = r2_score(y_hist, model.predict(X_hist))\n",
    "    models[target] = model\n",
    "    predictions[target] = pred\n",
    "    scores[target] = r2\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"Model fit (R^2 on historical data, linear trend vs Year):\")\n",
    "for t in targets:\n",
    "    print(f\"  {t:8s}  R^2 = {scores[t]:.3f}   slope/yr = {models[t].coef_[0]:.3f}\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "> **Reading the R\u00b2 values:** Revenue (R\u00b2\u22480.89) and DSO (R\u00b2\u22480.79) follow a fairly clean linear trend. DIO (R\u00b2\u22480.02) does **not** \u2014 it dipped in FY2023 then recovered, so a straight line barely explains its movement. DPO (R\u00b2\u22480.24) is similarly noisy. This is reported honestly rather than hidden: treat the DIO/DPO forecasts as a trend-continuation estimate, not a high-confidence prediction. A future iteration could swap in a model that captures the dip (e.g. polynomial or a few more years of data)."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "output_type": "execute_result",
     "execution_count": 5,
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "   Year  Predicted Revenue  ...  Predicted DPO  Predicted CCC\n",
       "0  2026            69505.0  ...          131.0          -68.1\n",
       "1  2027            73669.0  ...          133.5          -70.1\n",
       "2  2028            77832.0  ...          136.0          -72.1\n",
       "\n",
       "[3 rows x 6 columns]"
      ],
      "text/html": [
       "<table border=\"1\" class=\"dataframe\">\n",
       "  <thead>\n",
       "    <tr style=\"text-align: right;\">\n",
       "      <th>Year</th>\n",
       "      <th>Predicted Revenue</th>\n",
       "      <th>Predicted DIO</th>\n",
       "      <th>Predicted DSO</th>\n",
       "      <th>Predicted DPO</th>\n",
       "      <th>Predicted CCC</th>\n",
       "    </tr>\n",
       "  </thead>\n",
       "  <tbody>\n",
       "    <tr>\n",
       "      <td>2026</td>\n",
       "      <td>69505.0</td>\n",
       "      <td>46.3</td>\n",
       "      <td>16.6</td>\n",
       "      <td>131.0</td>\n",
       "      <td>-68.1</td>\n",
       "    </tr>\n",
       "    <tr>\n",
       "      <td>2027</td>\n",
       "      <td>73669.0</td>\n",
       "      <td>46.5</td>\n",
       "      <td>16.9</td>\n",
       "      <td>133.5</td>\n",
       "      <td>-70.1</td>\n",
       "    </tr>\n",
       "    <tr>\n",
       "      <td>2028</td>\n",
       "      <td>77832.0</td>\n",
       "      <td>46.6</td>\n",
       "      <td>17.3</td>\n",
       "      <td>136.0</td>\n",
       "      <td>-72.1</td>\n",
       "    </tr>\n",
       "  </tbody>\n",
       "</table>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {}
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "forecast = pd.DataFrame({\n",
    "    \"Year\": [2026, 2027, 2028],\n",
    "    \"Predicted Revenue\": predictions[\"Revenue\"].round(0),\n",
    "    \"Predicted DIO\": predictions[\"DIO\"].round(1),\n",
    "    \"Predicted DSO\": predictions[\"DSO\"].round(1),\n",
    "    \"Predicted DPO\": predictions[\"DPO\"].round(1),\n",
    "})\n",
    "forecast[\"Predicted CCC\"] = (forecast[\"Predicted DIO\"] + forecast[\"Predicted DSO\"] - forecast[\"Predicted DPO\"]).round(1)\n",
    "\n",
    "forecast"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 6,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "output_type": "display_data",
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 1100x700 with 4 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {}
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 2, figsize=(11, 7))\n",
    "plot_specs = [(\"DIO\", axes[0,0]), (\"DSO\", axes[0,1]), (\"DPO\", axes[1,0])]\n",
    "all_years = list(history[\"Year\"]) + list(forecast[\"Year\"])\n",
    "\n",
    "for metric, ax in plot_specs:\n",
    "    ax.plot(history[\"Year\"], history[metric], \"o-\", color=\"#15375C\", label=\"Actual\", linewidth=2)\n",
    "    pred_col = f\"Predicted {metric}\"\n",
    "    connect_x = [history[\"Year\"].iloc[-1]] + list(forecast[\"Year\"])\n",
    "    connect_y = [history[metric].iloc[-1]] + list(forecast[pred_col])\n",
    "    ax.plot(connect_x, connect_y, \"o--\", color=\"#0F7A66\", label=\"Predicted\", linewidth=2)\n",
    "    ax.set_title(metric, fontsize=11, fontweight=\"bold\")\n",
    "    ax.set_xticks(all_years)\n",
    "    ax.grid(alpha=0.25)\n",
    "    ax.legend(fontsize=8)\n",
    "\n",
    "ax4 = axes[1,1]\n",
    "ax4.plot(history[\"Year\"], history[\"CCC\"], \"o-\", color=\"#15375C\", label=\"Actual CCC\", linewidth=2)\n",
    "connect_x = [history[\"Year\"].iloc[-1]] + list(forecast[\"Year\"])\n",
    "connect_y = [history[\"CCC\"].iloc[-1]] + list(forecast[\"Predicted CCC\"])\n",
    "ax4.plot(connect_x, connect_y, \"o--\", color=\"#0F7A66\", label=\"Predicted CCC\", linewidth=2)\n",
    "ax4.axhline(0, color=\"#9AAEC2\", linewidth=1, linestyle=\":\")\n",
    "ax4.set_title(\"CCC\", fontsize=11, fontweight=\"bold\")\n",
    "ax4.set_xticks(all_years)\n",
    "ax4.grid(alpha=0.25)\n",
    "ax4.legend(fontsize=8)\n",
    "\n",
    "fig.suptitle(\"HUL Working Capital \u2014 Linear Regression Forecast (FY2026E-FY2028E)\", fontsize=13, fontweight=\"bold\")\n",
    "fig.tight_layout(rect=[0, 0, 1, 0.95])\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Phase 4: Export predictions to `AI_Predictions.xlsx`\n",
    "\n",
    "Writes the exact column layout requested \u2014 Year, Predicted DIO, Predicted DSO, Predicted DPO, Predicted CCC \u2014 plus a `Model Notes` sheet documenting the algorithm and fit quality. This file is what gets imported into Power BI."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 7,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "output_type": "stream",
     "name": "stdout",
     "text": [
      "Saved -> AI_Predictions.xlsx\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "FONT_NAME = \"Arial\"\n",
    "HEADER_FONT = Font(name=FONT_NAME, color=\"FFFFFF\", bold=True)\n",
    "HEADER_FILL = PatternFill(\"solid\", start_color=\"1F4E78\")\n",
    "BLACK = Font(name=FONT_NAME, color=\"000000\")\n",
    "thin = Side(style=\"thin\", color=\"B7B7B7\")\n",
    "BORDER = Border(left=thin, right=thin, top=thin, bottom=thin)\n",
    "DAYS_FMT = '#,##0.0;(#,##0.0);\"-\"'\n",
    "\n",
    "wb = Workbook()\n",
    "ws = wb.active\n",
    "ws.title = \"AI Predictions\"\n",
    "\n",
    "ws[\"A1\"] = \"HUL \u2014 AI/ML Predicted Working Capital Cycle (Linear Regression)\"\n",
    "ws[\"A1\"].font = Font(name=FONT_NAME, bold=True, size=13)\n",
    "ws.merge_cells(\"A1:E1\")\n",
    "ws[\"A2\"] = \"Model: scikit-learn LinearRegression, trained on FY2021-FY2025 actuals vs. Year. CCC = DIO + DSO - DPO.\"\n",
    "ws[\"A2\"].font = Font(name=FONT_NAME, italic=True, size=9, color=\"666666\")\n",
    "ws.merge_cells(\"A2:E2\")\n",
    "\n",
    "headers = [\"Year\", \"Predicted DIO\", \"Predicted DSO\", \"Predicted DPO\", \"Predicted CCC\"]\n",
    "for i, h in enumerate(headers, start=1):\n",
    "    c = ws.cell(row=4, column=i, value=h)\n",
    "    c.font = HEADER_FONT\n",
    "    c.fill = HEADER_FILL\n",
    "    c.alignment = Alignment(horizontal=\"center\", vertical=\"center\", wrap_text=True)\n",
    "    c.border = BORDER\n",
    "\n",
    "for r, row in forecast.iterrows():\n",
    "    excel_row = 5 + r\n",
    "    ws.cell(row=excel_row, column=1, value=int(row[\"Year\"]))\n",
    "    ws.cell(row=excel_row, column=1).number_format = '@'\n",
    "    ws.cell(row=excel_row, column=1).font = BLACK\n",
    "    ws.cell(row=excel_row, column=1).alignment = Alignment(horizontal=\"center\")\n",
    "    ws.cell(row=excel_row, column=1).border = BORDER\n",
    "    for c_idx, col in enumerate([\"Predicted DIO\", \"Predicted DSO\", \"Predicted DPO\", \"Predicted CCC\"], start=2):\n",
    "        cell = ws.cell(row=excel_row, column=c_idx, value=float(row[col]))\n",
    "        cell.font = BLACK\n",
    "        cell.number_format = DAYS_FMT\n",
    "        cell.alignment = Alignment(horizontal=\"center\")\n",
    "        cell.border = BORDER\n",
    "\n",
    "ws2 = wb.create_sheet(\"Model Notes\")\n",
    "ws2[\"A1\"] = \"Model Details\"\n",
    "ws2[\"A1\"].font = Font(name=FONT_NAME, bold=True, size=13)\n",
    "notes = [\n",
    "    (\"Algorithm\", \"scikit-learn LinearRegression (ordinary least squares)\"),\n",
    "    (\"Features\", \"Year (FY2021-FY2025 used as training history)\"),\n",
    "    (\"Targets\", \"Revenue, DIO, DSO, DPO (independently fitted)\"),\n",
    "    (\"Derived metric\", \"CCC = Predicted DIO + Predicted DSO - Predicted DPO\"),\n",
    "    (\"Training rows\", \"5 (FY2021-FY2025 actuals)\"),\n",
    "]\n",
    "for t in targets:\n",
    "    notes.append((f\"R^2 ({t})\", round(scores[t], 3)))\n",
    "for i, (k, v) in enumerate(notes):\n",
    "    ws2.cell(row=3+i, column=1, value=k).font = Font(name=FONT_NAME, bold=True)\n",
    "    ws2.cell(row=3+i, column=2, value=v).font = BLACK\n",
    "ws2.column_dimensions[\"A\"].width = 22\n",
    "ws2.column_dimensions[\"B\"].width = 50\n",
    "\n",
    "for col, w in {\"A\": 12, \"B\": 16, \"C\": 16, \"D\": 16, \"E\": 16}.items():\n",
    "    ws.column_dimensions[col].width = w\n",
    "\n",
    "wb.save(\"AI_Predictions.xlsx\")\n",
    "print(\"Saved -> AI_Predictions.xlsx\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Result\n",
    "\n",
    "`AI_Predictions.xlsx` is ready to import into Power BI: **Get Data \u2192 Excel Workbook \u2192 AI Predictions** sheet. Column names match the AI Output sheet spec exactly (`Year`, `Predicted DIO`, `Predicted DSO`, `Predicted DPO`, `Predicted CCC`), so it drops straight into the existing **AI Forecast** page without remapping any fields."
   ]
  }
 ],
 "metadata": {

  },

   "version": "3.12"
  }
 },

}
